legacy.content:
# Phase 30-05 Summary: First-Person 3-Column Layout
## Done
- Added `layout-constants.ts`: W, H, LEFT_PANEL_W, RIGHT_PANEL_W, CENTER_W, NAV_ROW_Y, NAV_PANEL_H, PANEL_INSET, PANEL_INNER_MARGIN - Moved `hasEncounter` and `inRuneForgeContext` to `scene-blocks.ts`; grid and first-person both import - First-person now uses same 3-column layout: left nav, center narrative (look), right room stats + journal - Grid imports layout constants from `layout-constants.ts` - Updated KAPLAY-INTERFACE-SPEC implementation snapshot
## Files Changed
- `packages/kaplay-demo/src/layout-constants.ts` (new) - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/scene-blocks.ts` — exports hasEncounter, inRuneForgeContext - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/first-person.ts` — 3-column layout - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/grid.ts` — layout imports, remove local helpers - `.planning/KAPLAY-INTERFACE-SPEC.md`
## Verification
- Build passes - Both grid and first-person share the same shell: header → left nav → center → right journal → footer
